page: Microsoft Azure F8as_v7 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the Fasv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 8 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is, however, designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are no graphics processing units (GPUs) bundled with this instance, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the F8as_v7 offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core configurations. This profile is suited for workloads such as mid-sized web servers, application backends, containerized microservices, and development environments that require a steady balance of compute power and memory without the need for local NVMe storage or hardware acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure F8as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Fasv7 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of high-performance external storage volumes. It lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the F8as_v7 offers reliable, non-burstable performance. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes it a streamlined option for workloads that rely entirely on network-attached storage and standard CPU processing. This configuration is suited for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, containerized microservices, development environments, and moderate database hosting where external storage is utilized.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F8as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for balanced general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A balanced virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, thirty-two gigabytes of memory, and support for high-performance external storage volumes.
